docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION
THE ARBITRATION ASSIGNMENT DATE OF SEP-08-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-06-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MARIO

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CRYSTAL NICOLE CARTER, AN INDIVIDUAL, FROM THE COMPLAINT.
